narrative:
Fremont City 1-A (precinct in Sandusky County) has 719 registered voters, with 67.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 15.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.0%, a narrow Democratic lean of 1.8 percentage points.
